signal.description: diapr.ai accept-turn --normalize-staged-result replaced per-turn staged result with empty object after acceptance failure

evidence.value: Run run_0b00ed1aa694dda8, turn turn_fdbed710bb1ec95e. The turn staged .agentxchain/staging/turn_fdbed710bb1ec95e/turn-result.json with status completed and npm run verify pass. agentxchain step then reported startup failure despite staged result; status later showed failed_acceptance because src/diapr-core.mjs was dirty and not classified. Running agentxchain accept-turn --turn turn_fdbed710bb1ec95e --normalize-staged-result exited schema_error and after that cat .agentxchain/staging/turn_fdbed710bb1ec95e/turn-result.json returned {}. agentxchain validate --mode turn then reported No staged turn result found at .agentxchain/staging/turn-result.json, which appears to ignore the per-turn staging path. Workaround: stopped before editing product files or committing .agentxchain runtime churn; run remains active with failed_acceptance and uncheckpointed product files.
